zh.lifeSummary: 當Edmund Chamberlain Sr.於大約1617年出生在英國英格蘭貝德福爾盧頓時，他的父親Francis Chamberlain29歲，母親Agnes Haiden27歲。他於1647年1月4日與Mary Turner在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可洛波利結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1696年5月8日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州文達哈姆武德斯托可享年80歲，埋葬在美國康乃狄克州文達哈姆武德斯托可武德斯托可 希爾 其特利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Edmund Chamberlain Sr.于大约1617年出生在英国英格兰貝德福爾盧頓时，他的父亲Francis Chamberlain29岁，母亲Agnes Haiden27岁。他于1647年1月4日与Mary Turner在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可洛波利结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1696年5月8日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州文達哈姆武德斯托可享年80岁，埋葬在美国康涅狄格州文達哈姆武德斯托可武德斯托可 希爾 其特利。

nameMeanings.name: Chamberlain
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: status name from Old French chambrelain, Norman French cambrelanc, cambrelen(c) ‘chamberlain’ (of ancient Germanic origin, from kamer ‘chamber, room’, Latin camera (see Chambers ) + the diminutive suffix -(l)ing). This was originally the name of an official in charge of the private chambers of his master, but is so widespread in late medieval England that it must sometimes have been used of people of more ordinary status, perhaps as a nickname for an officious or self-important person or for someone who played the role of chamberlain in a folk play, tableau, or ceremony. Compare Chancellor for a possible similar usage.

variants.name: Chamberlin
meanings: French: occupational name for an official in charge of the private chambers of his master, from Old French chamberlenc ‘chamberlain’. See also Chamberlain and compare above.

variants.name: Chambers
meanings: from Middle English chaumbre ‘room (in a house); reception room in a palace or official building’ (Old French chambre). It is identical in implied function with the Chamberlain , which denoted an official: to pay in cameram was to pay into the exchequer, of which the camerarius or chamberer was in charge. The surname also applied to clerks employed there. As the office of Chamberlain rose in the social scale, this term remained reserved for more humble servants of the bedchamber or private quarters.
(of Norman origin): habitational name from Les Chambres, Manche (France).

nameMeanings.name: Edmund
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + mund ‘protector’. It was borne by several early royal and saintly figures, including a 9th-century king of East Anglia killed by invading Danes, allegedly for his adherence to Christianity. In the 16th and 17th centuries, there was a good deal of interchange between Edmund and Edward.

en.lifeSummary: When Edmund Chamberlain Sr. was born about 1617, in Luton, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Francis Chamberlain, was 29 and his mother, Agnes Haiden, was 27. He married Mary Turner on 4 January 1647, in Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 8 May 1696, in Woodstock, Windham, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 80, and was buried in Woodstock Hill Cemetery, Woodstock, Windham, Connecticut, United States.

ko.lifeSummary: Edmund Chamberlain Sr.(이)가 대략 1617년 영국 잉글랜드 베드퍼드실르 루턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Francis Chamberlain(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Haiden(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1647년 1월 4일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 록스버이에서 Mary Turner(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1696년 5월 8일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 윈드함 우드스톡에서 80세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 코네티컷 주 윈드함 우드스톡 우드스톡 힐 세멧리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Edmund Chamberlain Sr. nasceu aproximadamente 1617, em Luton, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Francis Chamberlain, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Haiden, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Mary Turner em 4 de janeiro de 1647, em Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 8 de maio de 1696, em Woodstock, Windham, Conecticute, British Colonial America, com 80 anos, e foi sepultado em Woodstock Hill Cemetery, Woodstock, Windham, Conecticute, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Edmund Chamberlain Sr. родился около 1617 г. в местности лутон, бедфордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Francis Chamberlain было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Haiden, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary Turner 4 января 1647 г. в местности роксбури, суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 8 мая 1696 г. в местности вудстокк, виндхам, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 80 лет и был похоронен в местности вудстокк хилл кеметири, вудстокк, виндхам, Коннектикут, Соединенные штаты.

Se casó con Mary Turner el 4 de enero de 1647, en Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas.
